plugins.prepareCmd: node dist/node-server/sync-release-version.js ${nextRelease.version} && npm run build:extension && npm run package:release && chmod +x sliccstart/sign-and-package.sh && sliccstart/sign-and-package.sh ${nextRelease.version}
plugins.publishCmd: npx wrangler deploy && npx vitest run src/worker/deployed.test.ts
